challengeTask: Use 'wanted to' or 'wanted' in at least 12 real sentences today — write them in a diary, send them in a WhatsApp message, or speak them during a conversation. Include at least 2 negatives and 2 questions.
hindiTask: आज 'wanted to' या 'wanted' का उपयोग करते हुए कम से कम 12 real sentences लिखें — diary में, WhatsApp message में, या किसी conversation में। कम से कम 2 negative और 2 question sentences ज़रूर शामिल करें।
successCriteria: 'Wanted to + base verb' structure is used correctly (not 'wanted + verb')
At least 2 negatives use 'did not want' (not 'did not wanted')
At least 2 questions use 'Did + subject + want' (not 'Did + subject + wanted')
At least one professional/office sentence is included
No subject-verb agreement errors (all subjects use same 'wanted' form)
bonusChallenge: Write a short paragraph about your childhood dreams using 'I always wanted to...', 'I did not want to...', and 'Did you ever want to...?' forms. Share it with a friend and ask them to check your grammar.
